plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Lyra needs your location to find compatible people nearby.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Lyra needs background location to notify you when someone compatible is near.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Lyra needs your location to guide you toward your match.

plugins.photosPermission: Lyra needs access to your photos so you can add pictures to your profile.

plugins.localNetworkUsagePermissionText: Lyra uses local networking to detect when your match is nearby
